titles.title: In the Twinkling of an Eye

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: In the twinkling of an eye, I'll see Jesus When I see His blessed face, I'll feel so free For I've been waiting in the bridegroom line-up And I'm going home, Lord, where I belong.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: So don't be grieving, because I'm leaving For I'm waiting for the Bridegroom to take me home I'll step to glory to tell my story In the twinkling of an eye, we'll be gone.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: In the twinkling of an eye at the last trump The graves will open and the dead in Christ shall rise For they've been waiting in the Bridegroom line-up And we're going home to see our Jesus Christ.
